title: Woodland Wins Houston
excerpt: Gary Woodland takes the Texas Children's Houston Open, Nicolai Højgaard finishes second
body:
PGA Tour Update

Gary Woodland has taken the top spot at the Texas Children's Houston Open, finishing with a score of -18. Nicolai Højgaard came in second with a score of -17, while Min Woo Lee and Michael Thorbjornsen tied for third at -12.

Leaderboard Highlights

The leaderboard was filled with impressive performances, including Sam Stevens and Jason Day tying for fifth at -11. Sudarshan Yellamaraju, Paul Waring, and Sahith Theegala all finished at -10, tied for seventh.

Upcoming Tournaments

The DP World Tour is set to continue with the Hero Indian Open from March 26-29, followed by the Masters from April 9-12. The LIV Golf tour recently saw the 4Aces GC team take the top spot in Singapore, with a score of -27.

Gary Woodland

Global Golf Scene

The golf world is buzzing with activity, from the PGA Tour to the DP World Tour and LIV Golf. With the Masters just around the corner, players are gearing up for one of the biggest tournaments of the year. Be sure to stay tuned for more updates and analysis from the world of golf.
